digest.en: US envoys Jared Kushner and Avi Witkoff will head to Pakistan on Saturday for fresh Iran talks. They will meet with Iranian Foreign Minister Mohammad Javad Zarif. US Deputy Secretary of State Stephen Vance is on standby.
digest.hi: संयुक्त राष्ट्र महासभा की अध्यक्ष एनालेना बेयरबॉक अगले सप्ताह भारत की यात्रा करेंगी। उनकी द्विपक्षीय बैठकों में कई महत्वपूर्ण मुद्दों पर चर्चा होने की संभावना है। भारत और जर्मनी के बीच संबंधों में सुधार की कोशिशें जारी हैं।

articles.title: US envoys will head to Pakistan on Saturday for fresh Iran talks
articles.summary: Iran's top diplomat is heading to Pakistan for fresh talks, sources say. Live updates: Iran’s top diplomat heads to Pakistan as fresh talks expected, sources say CNN. Live updates: US envoys will head to Pakistan on Saturday for fresh Iran talks CNN.

articles.title: US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: Trump sending envoys to Pakistan for talks with
articles.summary: US envoy envoys are heading to Pakistan for talks with Iran's foreign minister, amid a war ceasefire. The US has put its envoy on standby, as the situation remains fragile.

articles.title: Trump dispatches Witkoff, Kushner to Pakistan for talks with Iran’s FM Araghchi; Vance on ‘standby’
articles.summary: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi is set to arrive in Pakistan tonight for talks with the US, with a US delegation likely to follow on April 25 to discuss a framework for negotiations.

articles.title: Kushner and Witkoff to Talk With Iranian Officials in Pakistan
articles.summary: The Israeli military extended its truce with Lebanon by three weeks, despite striking Hezbollah targets on Friday. The cease-fire aims to end the war in Iran. The Israeli military said it had struck Hezbollah targets on Friday, but its truce with Lebanon appeared to be holding.

articles.title: Vance on 'standby' as Witkoff, Kushner to reach Pakistan on April 25 for talks with Iran, White
articles.summary: Iran's foreign minister is leading a delegation to Islamabad for talks with Pakistani officials. The Iranian delegation will discuss regional developments and the war situation. Iranian delegation led by FM Araghchi to reach Islamabad tonight; to “hold bilateral consultations on developments in the region, as well as the latest situation” in the war.

articles.title: US Confirms Talks With Iran, 2 Key Officials To Fly To Pak Tomorrow
articles.summary: The US has confirmed that two key officials will fly to Pakistan tomorrow for talks with Iran. The talks aim to address the ongoing conflict. US Confirms Talks With Iran, 2 Key Officials To Fly To Pak Tomorrow.

articles.title: Netanyahu Accuses Hezbollah of "Trying To Sabotage" Lebanon Peace Efforts
articles.summary: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has accused Hezbollah of trying to sabotage Lebanon's peace efforts. Netanyahu made the statement without providing further details. Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu (File). Netanyahu Accuses Hezbollah of "Trying To Sabotage" Lebanon Peace Efforts.

articles.title: Three Kosovo Serbs jailed over deadly gun battle and monastery siege
articles.summary: Kosovo's court has sentenced three Serbs to prison for their roles in a deadly gun battle and monastery siege in 2023. Two men received life imprisonment, while one was sentenced to 30 years.

articles.title: Witkoff, Kushner to head to Pakistan for new Iran peace talks, White House says
articles.summary: The US and Iran remain in a standoff in the Strait of Hormuz, with Hezbollah rejecting a Lebanon ceasefire. Live Updates: U. S. and Iran remain locked in Strait of Hormuz standoff, Hezbollah rejects Lebanon ceasefire CBS News.

articles.title: As Putin Orders That the Economy Be Fixed, Russia Grasps for Solutions
articles.summary: Russia's central bank cut interest rates again amid wartime spending strains. Another interest-rate cut highlights the narrowing path for the country’s central bank amid the strains of immense wartime spending.

articles.title: China slaps export curbs on European firms over Taiwan arms sales
articles.summary: China imposed export curbs on seven European firms over Taiwan arms sales. They prohibit exports of "dual-use items" to the seven named entities or transfers of such items that originated in China by "foreign organisations and individuals", the statement said.

articles.title: Russian oil exports slump as Ukraine hammers ports and refineries
articles.summary: Russian oil exports fell due to Ukraine's attacks on ports and refineries. Despite US sanctions waiver, Russian oil exports could fall to lowest levels since 2023, sources say. Russian oil exports slump as Ukraine hammers ports and refineries.

articles.title: U.S. soldier charged with using classified intel to win $400K Polymarket bet on Maduro raid
articles.summary: US soldier Gannon Van Dyke was charged with using classified intel for betting. Gannon Ken Van Dyke allegedly placed those bets between December 30 and January 2, with the vast majority occurring the night of January 2.

articles.title: Israel and Lebanon extend ceasefire amid Hormuz uncertainty
articles.summary: Israel and Lebanon extended their ceasefire amid uncertainty in the Hormuz region. Live updates: Israel and Lebanon extend ceasefire amid Hormuz uncertainty NBC News.

articles.title: Is the U.S. Trying to Suspend Spain From NATO? Sánchez Addresses Reported Pentagon Email
articles.summary: Spanish Prime Minister Sanchez denied a reported US plan to suspend Spain from NATO, saying the country's position on the Iran war remains firm and unchanged. Is the U. S. Trying to Suspend Spain From NATO?

articles.title: 1980s Tanker War History: A Blueprint For Today's US-Iran Conflict
articles.summary: The US Navy is familiar with Iran's small boat tactics from the 1980s Tanker War. The US Navy has long been familiar with the small boat tactics deployed by Iran's Revolutionary Guard.

articles.title: Israel-Lebanon ceasefire extended by three weeks
articles.summary: Israel and Lebanon extended their ceasefire by three weeks after US-brokered talks. U. S. President Donald Trump announces the development after meeting representatives from both countries in Washington. Israel-Lebanon ceasefire extended by three weeks.

articles.title: US justice department drops probe into Fed chairman Jerome Powell
articles.summary: The US justice department dropped its probe into Fed chairman Jerome Powell. President Donald Trump had accused Powell of improper cost overruns in renovating the Fed's building. US justice department drops probe into Fed chairman Jerome Powell.

articles.title: Woman Trapped In Poo For 3 Hours After Outdoor Toilet Collapses In Australian Outback
articles.summary: A tourist was rescued after being trapped in a pit toilet for three hours. A tourist trapped in a pit toilet for three hours was rescued safely. Woman Trapped In Poo For 3 Hours After Outdoor Toilet Collapses In Australian Outback.

articles.title: US has three aircraft carriers in the Middle East for first time since 2003
articles.summary: The US has deployed three aircraft carriers in the Middle East for the first time since 2003, as part of a blockade on Iran's ports, amid a fragile truce and escalating tensions.

articles.title: Alcaraz's French Open three-peat dreams dashed as wrist injury forces withdrawal
articles.summary: Alcaraz withdrew from the French Open due to a wrist injury. Alcaraz's French Open three-peat dreams dashed as wrist injury forces withdrawal.

articles.title: विश्व में बढ़ते युद्ध: कब थमेगा ये संघर्ष?
articles.summary: वैश्विक स्तर पर युद्ध बढ़ रहे हैं. इस संघर्ष के कारणों और समाधान के बारे में चर्चा हो रही है. विश्व में बढ़ते युद्ध: कब थमेगा ये संघर्ष?

articles.title: ब्रिटेन ने सुधारी 100 साल पुरानी गलती, शहीद भारतीय सैनिकों को अब मिला सम्मान, जानिए पूरा मामला
articles.summary: ब्रिटेन ने 100 साल पुरानी गलती सुधारी है। शहीद भारतीय सैनिकों को अब सम्मान मिला है। यह ब्रिटेन की ओर से एक महत्वपूर्ण कदम है। UK: ब्रिटेन ने सुधारी 100 साल पुरानी गलती, शहीद भारतीय सैनिकों को मिला अब सम्मान, जानिए पूरा मामला।

articles.title: संयुक्त राष्ट्र महासभा की अध्यक्ष एनालेना बेयरबॉक अगले सप्ताह भारत की यात्रा करेंगी
articles.summary: यह यात्रा भारत और संयुक्त राष्ट्र के बीच संबंधों को मजबूत बनाने के लिए महत्वपूर्ण होगी। बेयरबॉक भारत के साथ सहयोग पर चर्चा करेंगी। संयुक्त राष्ट्र महासभा की अध्यक्ष एनालेना बेयरबॉक अगले सप्ताह भारत की यात्रा करेंगी ThePrint Hindi।

articles.title: ट्रंप की विवादित पोस्ट के बाद भारत के समर्थन में उतरा ईरान, अमेरिका के अंदर कैसी प्रतिक्रिया
articles.summary: ईरान ने ट्रंप की विवादित पोस्ट के बाद भारत का समर्थन किया। डोनाल्ड ट्रंप ने एक पोस्ट शेयर की थी जिसमें भारत और चीन को 'धरती पर नरक' बताया गया था.

articles.title: विचारधाराओं के उधार लिए गए चश्मे से देखा जा रहा ईरान युद्ध, सत्य के विरुद्ध अपराध
articles.summary: ईरान युद्ध को विचारधाराओं के चश्मे से देखा जा रहा है। इससे सत्य के विरुद्ध अपराध हो रहा है। युद्ध की बदलती परिभाषाएं सामने आ रही हैं। हार-जीत की बदलती परिभाषाएं: विचारधाराओं के उधार लिए गए चश्मे से देखा जा रहा ईरान युद्ध, सत्य के विरुद्ध अपराध Amar Ujala।

articles.title: भारत ने कहा- सुरक्षा परिषद के ढांचे में तत्काल व्यापक सुधार जरूरी, यह समय की मांग
articles.summary: भारत ने संयुक्त राष्ट्र में कहा कि सुरक्षा परिषद के ढांचे में तत्काल सुधार जरूरी है. यह समय की मांग है और परिषद को अधिक प्रतिनिधित्व और प्रभावी बनाने की आवश्यकता है.
